# Stethix Healthcare LLP

> Stethix Healthcare LLP is a veterinary diagnostic equipment supplier headquartered in Ernakulam, Kerala, India. Founded in 2024, the company supplies premium diagnostic instruments from 10+ international brands to veterinary clinics, animal hospitals, and government veterinary institutions across 18+ states in India.

## What We Do

Stethix Healthcare supplies, installs, and supports veterinary diagnostic equipment for the full spectrum of animal healthcare practices — from single-vet small clinics to large corporate animal hospital chains. We are authorised suppliers of HORIBA, Mindray, Abbott iSTAT, Pushkang, Bionote, and other leading veterinary diagnostic brands.

Our product range covers:
- Veterinary hematology analysers (CBC/blood count machines)
- Veterinary biochemistry analysers
- Point-of-care (POC) and ABG analysers for veterinary use
- Progesterone analysers for canine breeding
- Veterinary lab consumables and reagents
- Veterinary laser therapy equipment

We also provide after-sales services including installation, staff training, Annual Maintenance Contracts (AMC), and ongoing reagent supply.

## Who We Serve

- Small and single-vet animal clinics
- Private veterinary hospitals and polyclinics
- Corporate animal hospital chains
- Government veterinary institutions and colleges
- Pet care centres and breeding facilities

## Pan-India Presence

Stethix Healthcare supplies veterinary diagnostic equipment across 18+ states in India:

Kerala, Telangana, Karnataka, Andhra Pradesh, Tamil Nadu, Maharashtra, Delhi, Gujarat, Rajasthan, Madhya Pradesh, Uttar Pradesh, West Bengal, Punjab, Haryana, Odisha, Assam, Jharkhand, Bihar.

## Regional Focus

### Kerala
Headquartered in Ernakulam, Kochi, Kerala. Primary support hub for all veterinary practices in Kerala. Key cities and districts served: Kochi (Ernakulam), Thiruvananthapuram, Kozhikode, Thrissur, Kottayam, Kollam, Palakkad, Malappuram, Kannur, Alappuzha, Pathanamthitta, Idukki, Wayanad, Kasaragod. We are a leading veterinary diagnostic equipment supplier in Kerala serving both private clinics and government veterinary hospitals across all 14 districts.

### Telangana
Operational office in Telangana. Key cities served: Hyderabad, Warangal, Nizamabad, Karimnagar, Khammam, Nalgonda, Mahbubnagar, Medak. We supply veterinary equipment to clinics and corporate animal hospitals across Telangana, including the Hyderabad metropolitan area.

### Karnataka
Operational office in Karnataka. Key cities served: Bengaluru (Bangalore), Mysuru (Mysore), Hubli, Mangaluru, Belagavi, Davangere, Shivamogga, Tumakuru. We supply veterinary diagnostic analysers and lab equipment to clinics and hospitals across Karnataka.

### Andhra Pradesh
Key cities served: Visakhapatnam (Vizag), Vijayawada, Guntur, Tirupati, Nellore, Kakinada, Rajahmundry, Kurnool, Anantapur. Stethix Healthcare is an authorised veterinary equipment supplier in Andhra Pradesh.

### Tamil Nadu
Key cities served: Chennai, Coimbatore, Madurai, Tiruchirappalli (Trichy), Salem, Erode, Tirunelveli, Vellore, Thanjavur.

### Maharashtra
Key cities served: Mumbai, Pune, Nagpur, Nashik, Aurangabad, Solapur, Kolhapur, Thane, Navi Mumbai.

## Brands We Supply

- **HORIBA** — veterinary hematology analysers
- **Mindray** — veterinary hematology (haematology) and biochemistry systems
- **Abbott iSTAT** — point-of-care blood gas and electrolyte analysers
- **Pushkang** — veterinary diagnostic equipment
- **Bionote** — rapid veterinary diagnostic tests and analysers
- Additional premium veterinary diagnostic brands (10+ total)
